Which one of the following formulas can be used to calculate Operating Cash Flow (OCF) under tax shield approach?
op: OCF = (sales – cost) x (1 + tax rate) + (depreciation x tax rate)
OCF = (sales + cost) x (1 – tax rate) + (depreciation x tax rate)
OCF = (sales – cost) x (1 – tax rate) – (depreciation x tax rate)
OCF = (sales – cost) x (1 – tax rate) + (depreciation x tax rate)
ca: OCF = (sales – cost) x (1 – tax rate) + (depreciation x tax rate)

Which of the following short-term rating by PACRA denotes a strong capacity for timely repayment?
Payment of interest on debt securities is fully tax deductible item because:
op: It’s a cost of doing business
ca: It’s a cost of doing business

qt: Between the two identical bonds having different maturity periods, the price of the ________ bond will change less than that of ________ bond.
Expectation of a ______ inflation rate will push long term interest rates ______ than short term rates reflected by an upward term structure.

ABC Company issues 5 year bonds having following characteristics: 
Rs. 1,000 face value, initial price Rs. 497 and yield to maturity is 15%.
Bonds issued by ABC Company falls under which one of the following type of bonds?
Which of the following is an example of positive covenant?
op: Restricting pledging assets to other lenders
Limiting the amount of dividend according to some formula
Maintaining any collateral or security in good condition
ca: Maintaining any collateral or security in good condition

qt: Which of the following is NOT included in a bond indenture?
op: The total amount of bonds issued
A personal profile of the issuer
The basic terms of bond issue
ca: A personal profile of the issuer

qt: Which of the following is NOT a determinant of term structure?
Which of the following bond allows the holder to force the issuer to buy the bond back at a stated price?
A ______ covenant limits or prohibits actions that company might take.
While calculating the present value of bond, which of the following rate is used for discounting purpose?
op: You can use either coupon rate or market rate
Use that rate which is lower of both (coupon and market rate)

qt: Which of the following bond can be swapped for a fixed number of shares at any time before maturity at the holder’s option?
Which one of the following statements is INCORRECT regarding Bond Price Theorems?
op: When the market’s required return of a bond is greater than the coupon rate, the bond’s market value will be greater than its par value.
When the market’s required return of a bond is less than the coupon rate, the bond’s market value will be greater than its par value.
When a bond’s coupon rate is greater than the market’s required return, the bond’s market value will be greater than its par value.
Bond prices and market interest rates move in the opposite directions.
ca: When the market’s required return of a bond is greater than the coupon rate, the bond’s market value will be greater than its par value.
